adaptedResources.author: DscSamples
adaptedResources.description: The `WindowsSandbox` DSC resource is used to manage a Windows Sandbox instance.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description:
Specifies whether the Windows Sandbox should be running or not. This is a key property.
        Defaults to `Present`.

WsbFilePath.title: WsbFilePath
WsbFilePath.description: The path to an existing `.wsb` configuration file to load.

HostFolder.title: HostFolder
HostFolder.description: The path to a host folder to map into the sandbox.

SandboxFolder.title: SandboxFolder
SandboxFolder.description: The path inside the sandbox to map the host folder to.

ReadOnly.title: ReadOnly
ReadOnly.description: Specifies whether the mapped folder should be read-only.

LogonCommand.title: LogonCommand
LogonCommand.description: A command to run when the sandbox starts.

MemoryInMB.title: MemoryInMB
MemoryInMB.description: The amount of memory in megabytes to allocate to the sandbox.

vGPU.title: vGPU
vGPU.description: Enables or disables virtual GPU support.

AudioInput.title: AudioInput
AudioInput.description: Enables or disables audio input in the sandbox.

ClipboardRedirection.title: ClipboardRedirection
ClipboardRedirection.description: Enables or disables clipboard sharing between host and sandbox.

Networking.title: Networking
Networking.description: Enables or disables networking in the sandbox.

PrinterRedirection.title: PrinterRedirection
PrinterRedirection.description: Enables or disables printer access in the sandbox.

ProtectedClient.title: ProtectedClient
ProtectedClient.description: Enables or disables protected client mode.

VideoInput.title: VideoInput
VideoInput.description: Enables or disables video input in the sandbox.

embedded.description: The `WindowsSandbox` DSC resource is used to manage a Windows Sandbox instance.
embedded.title: Microsoft.WindowsSandbox.DSC/WindowsSandbox
